title: Flags management hook with filtering and status actions
purpose: Provides access to flag data with filtering capabilities and actions to resolve, dismiss, or reopen flags. Mocks API calls with simulated delays.
module_context: Exports a hook function 'useFlags' that manages flag state and provides action handlers. Includes mock data for flags and a filtering utility function.

steps.content: If no filters are provided, return all flags unchanged.
Filter flags by status if a status filter is provided.
Filter flags by topic name if a topic name filter is provided.
Return the filtered list of flags that match all provided criteria.
Initialize state for flags list, loading status, and error state.
Define an asynchronous function to fetch flags with simulated API delay.
Apply provided filters to mock flag data during fetch.
Set the fetched and filtered flags into state upon successful fetch.
Handle errors during fetch by setting error state.
Trigger the fetch function on component mount and when filters change.
Return an object containing flags, loading state, error state, and action functions.
Set the loading state to true before starting the fetch.
Clear any existing error state before starting the fetch.
Simulate an API delay using a timeout.
Apply the provided filters to the mock flags data.
Update the flags state with the filtered results.
IF the fetch fails, set the error state with the caught error.
Set the loading state to false after the fetch completes.
Trigger the fetch flags function to reload the flags list.
Simulate an API call with a timeout.
Update the state of the specified flag to resolved status.
Set the resolved timestamp for the flag.
Simulate an API call with a timeout.
Update the state of the specified flag to dismissed status.
Set the dismissal reason for the flag if provided.
Simulate an API call with a timeout.
Update the state of the specified flag to open status.
Clear the resolved timestamp for the flag.
Clear the dismissal reason for the flag.
